allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit - June 25 Peaceful Protest Website

Features:
- Dynamic hero carousel with 4 rotating banners
- Live animated statistics (participants & funds)
- Real-time countdown timer with urgency messaging
- Complete registration system (all 47 Kenyan counties)
- Transportation support with route details
- Legal aid request system with emergency hotline
- Comprehensive demands section (6 categories)
- Google Sheets integration for data saving
- Netlify deployment ready
- Fully responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Hamburger menu for mobile navigation
- Touch-friendly interactions
- Kenya flag color scheme (green, red, gold)

🇰🇪 Stand together. March peacefully. Demand change.
EOF
)")
